text: Hook → RPC mapping is registered in `src/cli/install/config.rs:87-93` (`claude_hook_entries`) and dispatched in `src/cli/hooks.rs:277-424` (`hook_dispatch`). Output is emitted as plain text on stdout for `UserPromptSubmit` and as a `hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext` JSON envelope for `PostToolUse` (`src/cli/turn.rs:129-146`, `src/cli/hooks.rs:183-195`).
